title: Release gate: merge money-arithmetic module (ADR 0003) to master
description: ADR 0003 shipped src/features/ledger/lib/arithmetic.ts (addMoney/subtractMoney built on roundMoney from ADR 0002) plus 9 unit tests, barrel export, and the ADR. Release policy is merge-to-master only with build+lint+tests green. Verified this run: npm test 34/34 pass (12 amount + 13 round + 9 arithmetic), eslint clean, tsc --noEmit clean, next build succeeds. Reviewer composition check confirmed: feeding any arithmetic result back through roundMoney is a no-op (idempotent), proving correct composition with the prior delivery. Architect does not self-merge — this is the Release authority's gate.

title: Merge ADR 0003 money-arithmetic to master (committed locally as 300e220)
description: Dev Clone verified and committed the Architect's ADR 0003 handoff. The four scoped files (arithmetic.ts + tests, barrel export, ADR) are committed on main as 300e220 but NOT pushed. Verified this run: npm test 34/34 pass (12 amount + 13 round + 9 arithmetic), tsc --noEmit clean, eslint clean on the scoped files. Scope was kept tight — the barrel only re-exports already-tracked siblings (round/amount/ingest), so a fresh checkout still compiles (no cross-work-order gap). Pushing to remote / merging to master is the outward-facing change requiring approval.

title: Apply postcss overrides pin to close standing XSS CVE (H1)
description: The postcss XSS advisory (GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93) is still open via next@16.2.6's nested postcss@8.4.31. The prior remediation bumped only the top-level postcss; a package.json `overrides` block is required to force the transitive copy to >=8.5.10. This is an actionable package.json change the user should approve before it ships.
